{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220702241B19FC9044584282F09B"}"},"total":854},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7526594523138229017","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺好看的后期有点爽，就是不够看，推荐"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752426018,"group_id":"7486813453416401982","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwR2bXOklQXXEH4PaMOUoHqaqPEMjxfb1tpUm0mfkuvh","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1603528425223624","user_name":"用户名97960817"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1603528425223624","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7486813453416401982","book_info":{"abstract":"（有真人讲书！）
【模拟器、原创奥、搞笑、奥特精神、雷奥尼克斯】
【大量创新剧情、不套路、还有很多有配图的新怪兽】
【半爽文、成长流、剧情向（看过剧的读者食用更佳）、可以带脑子看】
一场意外，让丁修成为了奥特曼的世界的一个普通人
好在，和他一起穿越的还有奥特模拟器
银河：【黑暗支配者发现了你内心的黑暗，赋予了你一次性的黑暗火花以及芝顿人偶】
丁修：黑暗扎基人偶？我的！
大怪兽格斗：【雷布朗多星人惊讶于体内的力量，迫不及待地在你的体内播下了祂的基因之种，你成为了雷奥尼克斯】
丁修：暗黑铠甲？雷奥尼克斯血脉？我的！
【超银河格斗】：……
丁修：不用说了！终极战斗仪！我的！
……
在一次又一次的模拟之中丁修变得越来越强，而那隐藏的真相也渐渐变得清晰了……
（十万字后开始配图、稳健不圣母、不ooc、不水剧情、挖坑必填、搞笑与热血兼具、拓展世界观有主角自己主线、打架不长篇大论、更新稳定，入股不亏）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/7ee01a419fca226c79a348450ab5f725","author":"一条草鱼","author_id":"","book_id":"7486813453416401982","book_name":"奥特：开局死遁，抢走扎基人偶","book_short_name":"奥特混沌至尊","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282828","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":367,"name":"奥特同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=367&name=奥特同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7497696515209577022","read_count":"34103","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1152158"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"508","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,二次元,奥特同人,搞笑轻松,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/be24b2a7a7f4312f398b59e2822f5ec3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779318144&x-signature=bVXxbQU6Sslzhox%2FDfMKq1VZo2Q%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"387454218026035","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"421"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220702241B19FC9044584282F09B"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_su
